title: Auto Smelt
description: Automatically smelt your ores into ingots while mining! This makes resource gathering a breeze!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33c536748237a9f6d38cc609c9d2b6d46435a5a_0.webp)

# Auto Smelt
Auto Smelt is your new mining buddy! This datapack automatically turns your ores into ingots as you mine, saving you time and hassle. Say goodbye to smelting and hello to effortless resource collection. Perfect for those who want to focus more on adventure and less on furnace duty!
